cards.prompt: Custom operator body (yield iterator): EveryOther keeps values at even index
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; using System.Collections.Generic; IEnumerable<T> EveryOther<T>(IEnumerable<T> src){ int i=0; foreach(var x in src){ if(i++ % 2 == 0) yield return x; } } var r = EveryOther(Enumerable.Range(1, 10)); Console.WriteLine(string.Join(",", r));

cards.prompt: Custom operator with yield is deferred: counter stays 0 until ToList (before=0 after=5)
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; using System.Collections.Generic; IEnumerable<int> Track(IEnumerable<int> src, Action onEach){ foreach(var x in src){ onEach(); yield return x; } } int calls=0; var q = Track(Enumerable.Range(1,5), () => calls++); Console.Write($"before={calls} "); var list = q.ToList(); Console.Write($"after={calls}");

cards.prompt: Custom operator composes with built-in LINQ: EveryOther then Where>3 then Sum
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; using System.Collections.Generic; IEnumerable<T> EveryOther<T>(IEnumerable<T> src){ int i=0; foreach(var x in src){ if(i++ % 2 == 0) yield return x; } } var r = EveryOther(Enumerable.Range(1, 10)).Where(x => x > 3).Sum(); Console.WriteLine(r);
